articles.title: IPL 2026 Final Faces Fresh Security Alert - Details Inside
articles.description:
The IPL 2026 final has received an additional layer of security attention after the league‚Äôs Anti-Corruption Unit (ACU) issued a warning regarding the use of smart wearable devices inside restricted stadium areas. Advanced gadgets such as smart glasses, smart goggles, and connected smartwatches have now been placed under the scanner due to concerns surrounding unauthorized communication during matches.

The development comes amid the league‚Äôs ongoing efforts to tighten integrity protocols and prevent any possible misuse of modern technology during one of cricket‚Äôs biggest tournaments. ACU has reportedly informed franchises and team officials that such devices could become a serious threat if used within restricted operational zones during live games.

READ MORE | Sunil Gavaskar's 3-Word Message To Vaibhav Sooryavanshi After He Touched His Feet

Why Smart Glasses And Wearables Have Become A Concern

Unlike traditional accessories, many modern wearable devices now come equipped with features such as live-streaming, messaging, calling, internet access, and video recording through mobile data or Wi-Fi connectivity. These capabilities have prompted the ACU to classify several smart gadgets as prohibited communication tools during matches.

According to a latest report published by the Indian Express, ‚ÄúAccording to sources, the ACSU flagged that these smart devices are capable of live streaming, sending and receiving text messages, and making audio and video calls through mobile data or Wi-Fi networks, raising concerns over unauthorized communication and potential misuse during matches. Under the IPL‚Äôs Player and Match Officials Area (PMOA) Minimum Standards, such devices have been classified as ‚ÄúAudio/Video Recording Devices‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúCommunication Devices‚ÄĚ.‚ÄĚ

Reports have also suggested that certain technology companies have been actively promoting smart eyewear products among IPL players and support staff during the ongoing season. The ACU‚Äôs latest advisory is aimed at ensuring that these gadgets do not compromise the integrity of the competition.

READ MORE | Suspense Ends On Lionel Messi As Argentina Reveal FIFA World Cup 2026 Squad

What Is PMOA And Why Is It Important?

The Player and Match Officials Area (PMOA) refers to highly secure sections within a stadium where access is limited to authorized individuals such as players, coaches, umpires, match officials, and anti-corruption officers. Strict rules are enforced in these zones to prevent any unauthorized interaction or communication during games.

This season already witnessed one controversy involving communication devices when Rajasthan Royals manager Romi Bhinder was reportedly seen using a mobile phone in the dugout during a league-stage fixture. While managers are permitted to carry phones inside dressing rooms for emergency purposes, their use in dugout areas is prohibited under IPL guidelines.The BCCI subsequently penalized Bhinder for violating PMOA rules.

‚ÄúWith wearable technology becoming more sophisticated and concerns growing over covert communication methods, the ACSU‚Äôs latest crackdown underlines the league‚Äôs attempt to stay ahead of evolving integrity risks during one of world cricket‚Äôs most commercially significant tournaments,‚ÄĚ sources told the media house.

The report further mentioned, ‚ÄúTeams were advised to ensure that net bowlers, logistics staff, throwdown specialists and other temporary personnel remained within approved access protocols and did not carry unauthorized communication devices into sensitive areas.‚ÄĚ

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs linked to $10M Atlanta Falcons star as Travis Kelce successor
articles.description: The Kansas City Chiefs have been linked to Atlanta Falcons tight end Kyle Pitts as speculation grows about finding a long-term successor to Travis Kelce. Pitts is playing on a franchise tag worth roughly $14.4 million, and some analysts believe Kansas City should explore a trade. While the Falcons have not indicated they want to move him, their decision against a long-term extension has fueled rumors that the 25-year-old could become available.

articles.title: ‚ÄúThen struggled‚ÄĚ: World No. 1 Jannik Sinner breaks silence on dizzy spell and vomiting feeling during heartbreaking French Open exit
articles.description: Jannik Sinner admitted he struggled physically during his French Open defeat after feeling dizzy and losing energy mid-match. The loss ended his 30-match winning streak and continued a pattern of fitness troubles at Grand Slams. Despite the setback, Sinner will likely stay World No. 1 and plans to rest before Wimbledon.
